suppliers.context: In September 2025 and November 2025, fires at a Novelis Inc. plant in New York disrupted operations at the facility. Novelis is a major aluminum supplier to Ford, and since the initial fire occurred, we have been working closely with Novelis to address the situation and exploring potential alternative sources of aluminum.

suppliers.relationship: sole supplier of Transit, Transit Custom, and Transit Courier commercial vehicles and the Puma for Europe
suppliers.context: Ford Otomotiv Sanayi Anonim Sirketi (“Ford Otosan”) — a joint venture in Türkiye among Ford (41%), the Koc Group of Türkiye (41%), and public investors (18%) that is the sole supplier to us of the Transit, Transit Custom, and Transit Courier commercial vehicles and the Puma for Europe and the sole distributor of Ford vehicles in Türkiye.

BlueOval SK, LLC (“BOSK”) — a 50/50 joint venture among Ford, SK On Co., Ltd. (“SK On”), and SK Battery America, Inc. (“SKBA,” a wholly owned subsidiary of SK On) formed to build and operate an EV battery plant in Tennessee and two EV battery plants in Kentucky to supply batteries to Ford and Ford affiliates.

suppliers.relationship: EV battery technology and joint venture partner
suppliers.context: BlueOval SK, LLC (“BOSK”) — a 50/50 joint venture among Ford, SK On Co., Ltd. (“SK On”), and SK Battery America, Inc. (“SKBA,” a wholly owned subsidiary of SK On) formed to build and operate an EV battery plant in Tennessee and two EV battery plants in Kentucky to supply batteries to Ford and Ford affiliates.

single_source_dependencies.component: Transit, Transit Custom, and Transit Courier commercial vehicles and the Puma for Europe
single_source_dependencies.context: Ford Otomotiv Sanayi Anonim Sirketi (“Ford Otosan”) — a joint venture in Türkiye among Ford (41%), the Koc Group of Türkiye (41%), and public investors (18%) that is the sole supplier to us of the Transit, Transit Custom, and Transit Courier commercial vehicles and the Puma for Europe.

geographic_concentration.context: CAF operates four assembly plants, an engine plant, and a transmission plant in China where it produces and distributes a variety of Ford and Lincoln brand passenger vehicle models. JMC operates two assembly plants and one engine plant in Nanchang.
The joint venture owns three plants, a parts distribution depot, and a research and development center in Türkiye, and a combined vehicle and engine plant in Romania.
AutoAlliance (Thailand) Co., Ltd. (“AAT”) — a 50/50 joint venture between Ford and Mazda that owns and operates a manufacturing plant in Rayong, Thailand.
Ford Vietnam Limited assembles and distributes a variety of Ford passenger and commercial vehicle models. The joint venture operates one plant in Vietnam.

capacity_constraints.context: In 2025, Ford Blue’s wholesales decreased 5% from a year ago, primarily driven by... lower F-150 wholesales driven by a disruption in aluminum supply.
These developments, which may continue to affect the pace of EV adoption, could extend the period of underutilization of EV production capacity across the industry.

supply_chain_risks.context: In 2025, Ford’s gross costs related to tariffs implemented or revised in 2025 was about $3 billion, including the impact of tariff relief, and the net EBIT impact was about $2 billion after offsets.

China’s restriction on the export of rare earth minerals, which we and our suppliers utilize for a number of components, has impacted (e.g., rescheduling production, changing operating patterns) and caused disruptions in our production operations.

For the manufacture of our electrified products, we are dependent on the supply of batteries and the raw materials (e.g., lithium, cobalt, and nickel) used by our suppliers to produce those batteries. Some of these resources are limited, and, as a result, we may be unable to acquire raw materials needed for our products in sufficient amounts.

geographic_revenue.context: Total Company revenues... for the years ended December 31 were as follows: United States $122,574 million.
Total Company revenues... for the years ended December 31 were as follows: Canada $14,548 million.
Total Company revenues... for the years ended December 31 were as follows: United Kingdom $12,298 million.
Total Company revenues... for the years ended December 31 were as follows: Mexico $2,463 million.

purchase_obligations.context: As of December 31, 2025, our outstanding purchase obligations under our compliance credit purchase agreements totaled about $1.6 billion.

purchase_obligations.obligation_type: offtake agreements for battery raw materials
purchase_obligations.context: As of December 31, 2025, our estimated expenditures for the maximum quantity that we are committed to purchase under these offtake agreements through 2035, subject to certain conditions, total approximately $4.7 billion based on our present forecast.

purchase_obligations.obligation_type: purchase obligations (raw materials, components, and services)
purchase_obligations.context: As of December 31, 2025, our purchase obligations include $2.3 billion due in 2026, $3.1 billion due in 2027-2028, $2.2 billion due in 2029-2030, and $1.2 billion due thereafter.

market_risk_disclosures.exposure: forecasted revenues and costs, assets, liabilities, and firm commitments denominated in certain foreign currencies
market_risk_disclosures.context: The potential change in the fair value from a 10% change in the underlying exchange rates, in U.S. dollar terms, would have been $3.0 billion at December 31, 2025.

market_risk_disclosures.exposure: base metals (steel, copper, aluminum), precious metals (palladium), energy (natural gas, electricity), plastics/resins, battery raw materials (lithium, cobalt, nickel)
market_risk_disclosures.context: The potential change in the fair value from a 10% change in the underlying commodity prices would have been $192 million at December 31, 2025.

market_risk_disclosures.sensitivity: 1 percentage point increase = $231 million reduction in portfolio value
market_risk_disclosures.context: Assuming a hypothetical increase in interest rates of one percentage point, the fair value of our portfolios would be reduced by $231 million, as calculated as of December 31, 2025.

inventory_composition.context: Raw materials, work-in-process, and supplies: $6,020 million at December 31, 2025.
